pattern: Simulate boarding with both arrays sorted to find the seat you can take, then walk backward from the latest candidate arrival time skipping any minute already occupied by another passenger.
hints: Sort buses and passengers, then play out the boarding so you know, for the bus you can catch, how full it is and what its departure time is.
If the last bus leaves with a free seat you may arrive as late as its departure; otherwise you must slip in just before the last passenger who boarded it.
From that best candidate time step downward one minute at a time, skipping every minute a real passenger already occupies, until you find a free minute.

edge_inputs.description: arrive just before a boarding passenger
buses and passengers unsorted with a contested last seat
single bus with spare capacity, arrive at departure
departure minute itself is taken by a passenger
bus fills, answer slips just before an early boarder
more passengers than seats across buses

stress.description: random unique departure and arrival times with random capacity
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    cap_n = max(1, min(size, 200))
    nb = rng.randint(1, cap_n)
    npass = rng.randint(1, cap_n)
    buses = rng.sample(range(2, 2 + 4 * (nb + npass) + 10), nb)
    passengers = rng.sample(range(2, 2 + 4 * (nb + npass) + 10), npass)
    capacity = rng.randint(1, max(1, npass))
    return [buses, passengers, capacity]
stress.note: rng.sample guarantees uniqueness within each array as required

solutions.python:
class Solution:
    def latestTimeCatchTheBus(self, buses, passengers, capacity):
        buses.sort()
        passengers.sort()
        pset = set(passengers)
        j = 0
        cand = 0
        n = len(buses)
        for idx, b in enumerate(buses):
            seats = capacity
            last_boarded = None
            while j < len(passengers) and seats > 0 and passengers[j] <= b:
                last_boarded = passengers[j]
                j += 1
                seats -= 1
            if idx == n - 1:
                cand = b if seats > 0 else last_boarded
        y = cand
        while y in pset:
            y -= 1
        return y
